name: 10th Gaon Chart Music Awards
overview:
10th GAON CHART Music Awards 2020 announces their new challenge — Live Online Concert. Titled 10th GAON CHART Music Awards 2020 2021 “10th GAON CHART Music Awards 2020” at , Mnet — South Korea Live Streaming, the online concert will be held on 13 Jan, 2021 7PM (PST) — 14 Jan, 2021 12PM (KST).

Be sure not to miss the special performances that can only be viewed at this no-live-audience concert!

This experience will be streamed live from Mnet — South Korea to worldwide.

[10th GAON CHART Music Awards 2021 “10th GAON CHART Music Awards 2020” at Mnet — South Korea [Live Streaming]

13 Jan, 2021 7PM (PST) — 14 Jan, 2021 12PM (KST)

※Rewatch will be available for a limited period of time.

trailers.title: WINNER PREDICTION - 'DIGITAL MUSIC' | 10TH GAON CHART MUSIC AWARDS 2020
